quests.name: Commander in the Flames
quests.description: Chief Weapon smith: Upon our trip into the cave at the volcano, an enormous Shogun Ceanataur dropped down from the ceiling right on top of us! Its ambush caused massive damage! Rid the world of that scourge!

quests.name: Under the Gaze of Heaven
quests.objective: Hunt the Shogun Ceanataur and Terra Shogun Ceanataur

quests.name: At Birds' Hill...
quests.notes: The Yian Kut-Ku in this quest is of the smallest possible size.

quests.name: The King's Domain
quests.description: Brave Boys: Did you hear it? That voice that shook the ground? It even scared the fearless mercenaries! It must have been the king of the skies! But if you're a real hunter, it won't be a problem!

quests.name: The King of the Mountains
quests.description: Foothills Villager: A Blangonga has staked its claim to a piece of the snowy mountains. Now we can't enter the area to gather firewood. Exterminate the Blangonga!

quests.name: Basarios Season
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver the Paw Pass Ticket
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Basarios must be hunted before the time is up.

quests.name: Operation Tropical Storm
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Save the Great Forest Town!
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Three Walls
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: A Hunter's Feast
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Absolute Power
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: The Tigrex, said to be an ancestor of today's wyverns, has finally made an appearance. With such a powerful beast on the loose, the village is not safe. Hunt it down at once!

quests.name: The Fierce Black Horn
quests.description: Failed Millionaire: I had hired the most skilled hunters imaginable, and went on a safari for the famed Diablos... But what we found was no mere Diablos! We must slay that black horned wyvern! No matter what!

quests.name: Terror of the Gravios
quests.description: Troubled Noble: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

quests.name: Descendants of the King
quests.objective: Hunt the Silver Rathalos and Gold Rathian

quests.name: The Final Invitation
quests.description: Scarlet Mystery Man: There are two Rajang, each with golden fur. Hunters, I have prepared a special stage for your grandest performance. Demonstrate your true power... He he he...
quests.notes: The first Rajang is of the smallest possible size, while the second is of the largest. Both start the quest enraged.

quests.name: Deathmatch in the Dunes!
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters!

quests.name: Fire, Electricity, Heat Ray
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters!

quests.name: The 3 Masters of the Volcano
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters!

quests.name: Diamond Dust
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters!

quests.name: Hunter's Funeral
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters!

quests.name: Pride on the Line
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters!

quests.name: Emperor of Flame
quests.description: Heroic General: I have an earnest request of you... I want you to fight the elder fire dragon we cornered in the Volcanic Belt! Weaken it with your repeated counterattacks and then finally slay the beast!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: Towards the Silence
quests.description: Grim Aristocrat: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but procedd with caution!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the snowy mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: A True Foe - The Giadrome!
quests.description: Spirited Boy: Within a group of the sly carnivorous Giaprey, there is a leader. They call it the Giadrome. I need a hunter's strength to show that pack of beasts and their leader who's boss!

quests.name: Reckless Bulldrome Hunter
quests.description: Troubled Father: My son decided to become a hunter and ran off after a Bulldrome on his own! Of course, now the tables have turned and I'm worried! Hunt down the Bulldrome on the snowy mountains!

quests.name: Aim for the Jungle Crab
quests.description: Uncomfortable Butler: I've always longed to go hunting in the jungle! However, if a huge monster appeared, I'd be finished! Maybe you could take out the Daimyo Hermitaur for me?

quests.name: Ultimate Crab Dinner
quests.description: The Lady Gourmet: I am a true connoisseur of crab cuisine, and as such a connoisseur, I suspect the Daimyo Hermitaurs found in the desert are incredibly tasty! One is never enough, so hunt down two!

quests.name: Trapped by Yian Kut-Ku
quests.objective: Hunt the Yian Kut-Ku and Blue Yian Kut-Ku
quests.description: Beautiful Lady: The Yian Kut-Ku are circling, screaming in their shrill voices. Everyone is trapped inside the town! Please do something!

quests.name: The Beating of Royal Wings
quests.notes: You must slay 25 Vespoids before the queen appears.

quests.objective: Defend the Fortress from Ashen Lao-Shan Lung
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the Swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the forest and hills. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the Volcanic Belt. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Two Roars in the Snow
quests.description: Alpine Survivor: It happened in an instant... Two Blangongas destroyed all the trees around my house. Now all I want to do is hunt them down so I can get my revenge. Please help me!

quests.name: Red Shadow in the Swampland
quests.description: Uncomfortable Butler: I've always longed to venture into the swamp! I think I could hunt down a Kelbi, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you'd take care of this special monster for me...

quests.name: The Poison Gas
quests.objective: Hunt the Gypceros and Purple Gypceros

quests.name: Dual Plesioth
quests.objective: Hunt the Plesioth and Green Plesioth
quests.description: Lovely Princess: The water wyvern known as Plesioth is raging in the jungle. And not just one of them! Head off immediately to slay them!

quests.name: Attack of the Rathian
quests.description: Caravan Leader: My caravan was wiped out by the queen of the skies, the killer Rathian! I'll pay you whatever you ask if you hunt down that foul creature! Help me kind hunter, you're my only hope!

quests.name: Water Wyvern in the Desert
quests.description: Proud Hunter: I found a giant water wyvern in a cave in the desert! I can't defeat it because it stays underwater. Slay it for me and the glory is all yours!

quests.name: The Underwater Terror
quests.description: The Old Misanthrope: That lake underneath the desert is connected to an underground river and patrolled by a green-scaled water wyvern... If you are truly a hunter, then it should pose no problem.

quests.name: Supreme Ruler of the Swamp
quests.description: Scheming Strategist: Hunter! It is time tohunt down the Shogun Ceanataur. Let us rid the swamp zone of this menace and expand our strategic possibilities. This is a highly classified hunt. So don't tell a soul!

quests.name: The Shogun's Encampment
quests.description: Hunter In Training: Hey! Hey! Have you heard the news!? There's a rumor that two enormous monsters with thick shells have appeared in the Volcanic Belt! There must be a hunter somewhere who can face them!

quests.name: Basarios: Unseen Peril
quests.description: Survivor: A wyvern attacked my team from out of the blue while we were on an expedition to the Volcanic Belt. Where did it come from? Please slay it!

quests.name: Lao-Shan Lung Draws Near!
quests.objective: Defend the Fortress from Ash Lao-Shan Lung
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: The Meeting of Sea and Air
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Red Lightning, Violet Blade
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: The Tigrex's Roar
quests.description: Guild Messenger: I have an urgent request from a hunter on an expedition in the desert! It seems he has encountered the mighty Tigrex! Go to his aid and crush this beast at once!

quests.name: Pink Dance in the Jungle
quests.description: Uncomfortable Butler: I've always longed to be a hunter, but a meeting with a Rathian ended that! Now that I know what it takes, I'll start over, but you have the spirit to hunt down that Rathian!

quests.name: The Runaway Diablos
quests.description: Border Captain: A giant wyvern smashed the border-wall and ran into this area. We need to find and kill it before it causes any more trouble!

quests.name: The Fierce Black Horn
quests.description: Failed Millionaire: I had hired the most skilled hunters imaginable, and went on a safari for the famed Diablos... But what we found was no mere Diablos! We must slay that black horned wyvern! No matter what!

quests.name: Four Horns
quests.objective: Hunt the Diablos and Black Diablos
quests.description: Lovely Princess: I simply can't bear to think about the terror and pain those Diablos are causing my people. I can't sleep at night with that worry! Hunt down those 2 Diablos for me!

quests.name: Terror of the Gravios
quests.description: Troubled Noble: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

quests.name: Black Rock in the Swamp
quests.description: Swamp Townsman: Even in the relative calm of the swamp zone, something has stirred up the monsters. In particular, heavily armored wyverns have been attacking us. Can you help us out?

quests.name: A Troublesome Pair
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A pair of fire wyverns have taken up residence in the hillside. If you are able to hunt them by yourself, you are truly a top class hunter. Care to try your luck?

quests.name: Blue Sky, Pink Earth
quests.objective: Hunt the Azure Rathalos and Pink Rathian

quests.name: Attack of the Rathalos
quests.description: Proud Soldier: It cannot be... We tried so hard to kill it... But... My entire war band was wiped out by a wyvern.Now it all rests upon your shoulders, monster hunter! Slay it!

quests.name: Deny the Silver Rathalos
quests.unlock: Hunt a combined total of 100 Bird, Flying, or Piscine Wyverns. Excluding the four Dromes.

quests.name: Find the Gold Phantom
quests.unlock: Hunt a combined total of 100 Bird, Flying, or Piscine Wyverns. Excluding the four Dromes.

quests.name: The Elder Dragon of Wind
quests.unlock: Clear all 6★ and 7★ Hunting Quests except for Epic Hunting ones and "Meeting of the Blangongas"
quests.description: Jungle Psychic: There was surely a vortex inside of that downpour. The wind wrapped around and revealed Kushala Daora! I don't foresee anyone defeating it. Weaken it and then drive it away!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: The Frozen Dictator
quests.unlock: Clear all 6★ and 7★ Hunting Quests except for Epic Hunting ones and "Meeting of the Blangongas"
quests.description: Fleeing Villager: I saw it! I saw it! In the middle of a blinding snow storm, there it was; dark black wings were dancing in the sky... No mere human could stand up to it! Don't even think of hunting it!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quests.unlock: Clear all 6★ and 7★ Hunting Quests except for Epic Hunting ones and "Meeting of the Blangongas"
quests.description: Injured Hero: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: Towards the Silence
quests.unlock: Clear all 6★ and 7★ Hunting Quests except for Epic Hunting ones and "Meeting of the Blangongas"
quests.description: Grim Aristocrat: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but procedd with caution!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: The War of Immolation
quests.unlock: Clear all 6★ and 7★ Hunting Quests except for Epic Hunting ones and "Meeting of the Blangongas"

quests.name: Emperor of Flame
quests.unlock: Clear all 6★ and 7★ Hunting Quests except for Epic Hunting ones and "Meeting of the Blangongas"
quests.description: Heroic General: I have an earnest request of you... I want you to fight the elder fire dragon we cornered in the Volcanic Belt! Weaken it with your repeated counterattacks and then finally slay the beast!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: Legendary Black Dragon
quests.unlock: Clear each Battle Training and hunt every Monster at least once.

quests.name: Ancestral Dragon
quests.unlock: Slay at least 5 of: Kirin, Kushala, Lunastra, Chameleos and Teostra. As well as 3 Lao and 3 Fatalis, including one Crimson.

quests.name: Two Queens
quests.objective: Hunt the Rathian and Pink Rathian

quests.name: Furious Beauties
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Fight for the Throne
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Hotter than Hell Itself
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Desert Unifier
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: The Approaching Gaoren
quests.objective: Defend the Town from Shen Gaoren
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: A True Foe - The Giadrome!
quests.description: Spirited Boy: Within a group of the sly carnivorous Giaprey, there is a leader. They call it the Giadrome. I need a hunter's strength to show that pack of beasts and their leader who's boss!

quests.name: A Pack of Blangos
quests.description: Wise Maiden: A large pack of Blangos are massing nearby. They are violent enough that a large group will quickly become uncontrollable. Please slay 15 of the apes!

quests.name: Mountain Herb Picking
quests.description: Loving Sibling: I want to pick some of this village's famous Mountain Herbs for my brother in town, but there are too many monsters! Could you please go out for me and bring back 5 Mountain Herbs?

quests.name: Hunt the Rare Forest Congas!
quests.description: Oblivious Daughter: I took a trip to the jungle and saw some beautiful pink animals with fangs. But when I tried to pet them from my carriage, the beasts made a stink on me! I can't get it off! Punish those meanies!

quests.name: A Mushroom Goldrush
quests.description: Greedy Merchant: Mushrooms from the jungle are skyrocketing in price! If you were to gather 20 of them for me, you would be justly compensated. However, I hear the area is infested with carnivores, so beware!

quests.name: The Land Shark
quests.description: Oasis Village Chief: Our pack-animals were eaten by something in the desert. But nobody actually saw the monster attack! Track down this vile beast and take it out!

quests.name: The Giant Enemy Crab
quests.description: Defeated Warrior: A giant crab is wandering around the desert! However, no normal sword is capable of cracking its shell! I hate to ask for help from other hunters, but please lend me your skills!

quests.name: The Lady Gourmet
quests.description: The Lady Gourmet: I travel the world for new tastes and flavors. Now I want to try the liver of a Piscine Wyvern, a taste few others have experienced. Please bring me 8 of these livers!

quests.name: The Shadow in the Mountains
quests.description: Old Geologist: We were exploring a snow-covered mountain near here, but stumbled on this disgusting blob-like monster! If you can't get rid of that thing, our research is doomed! Help us!

quests.name: The King of the Mountains
quests.description: Foothills Villager: A Blangonga has staked its claim to a piece of the snowy mountains. Now we can't enter the area to gather firewood. Exterminate the Blangonga!

quests.name: A Swarm of Hermitaurs
quests.description: Jungle Fisherman: Fishing is no easy endeavor, but lately things have gotten out of hand! While unloading my ship, a swarm of Hermitaur appeared. Slay 10 of them and let me get on with my work!

quests.name: Water Wyvern in the Desert
quests.description: Proud Hunter: I found a giant water wyvern in a cave in the desert! I can't defeat it because it stays underwater. Slay it for me and the glory is all yours!

quests.name: Gypceros: Venomous Terror
quests.description: Swamp Farmer: The fields all around the town are getting torn to shreds by a gigantic poisonous bird-like monster. Exterminate it for us! Its poison can melt crops, so be careful it doesn't melt you!

quests.name: Supreme Ruler of the Swamp
quests.description: Scheming Strategist: Hunter! It is time tohunt down the Shogun Ceanataur. Let us rid the swamp zone of this menace and expand our strategic possibilities. This is a highly classified hunt. So don't tell a soul!

quests.name: Slay the Great Kut-Ku!
quests.description: Foothills Guardsman: A bird-like Yian Kut-Ku is attacking people the world over! It has even shown up in these very hills! If it isn't eliminated soon, we're finished! Show me what you're made of!

quests.name: Hunt the Rathalos!
quests.unlock: Clear "Shadow in the Snow" Elder Quest
quests.description: The Kindly Lord: I request the assistance of only the bravest hunters to find and hunt the Rathalos that has appeared near here. Of course, a handsome reward will be paid upon success.

quests.name: Attack of the Rathian
quests.unlock: Clear "Shadow in the Snow" Elder Quest
quests.description: Caravan Leader: My caravan was wiped out by the queen of the skies, the killer Rathian! I'll pay you whatever you ask if you hunt down that foul creature! Help me kind hunter, you're my only hope!

quests.name: Gathering - Snowy Mountains
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the snowy mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Gathering - Jungle Zone
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Gathering - Desert Zone
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the desert. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Giadrome Assault
quests.description: Young Guardsman: After you killed those Giaprey, their leader showed up and it's not a happy camper! It's bigger and has a green crest. Find it and kill it!

quests.name: The Mountain Roughrider
quests.description: Familiar Villager: The thick skinned Bulldrome is well adapted to life in the mountains. Yet it's nothing but a pest for those of us living amongst the peaks! Which is why I'd like you to get rid of it!

quests.name: Slay the Giaprey!
quests.description: Proud Farmer: I chased off a Giaprey that was feeding on my Popos, but now it's back with 19 of its buddies! I can't take on the whole lot of them! Hunters, this is your chance! Please get rid of them for me!

quests.name: Find the Mountain Herbs!
quests.description: Loudmouth Lady: Steeping Mountain Herbs in this special brew has miraculous medical effects. However, I've run out of the herbs essential to the concoction. Find 20 of them and bring them to me!

quests.name: Hunt down the Velocidrome!
quests.description: Newly Wedded Husband: It seems that whenever my wife goes to pick mushrooms in the Jungle, a large carnivore appears! There's no way I can let her go pick mushrooms now... Please! Make the Jungle safe again!

quests.name: Blue Menace of the Jungle
quests.description: Jungle Envoy: I want you to hunt and kill the giant bird-like monster that has appeared in our jungle. It's wreaking havoc on our environment!

quests.name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
quests.description: Jungle Envoy: My village is under attack by a swarm of bug monsters! It seems there are about 20 of them. One on one they are not a threat, but as a group they are deadly. So be careful.

quests.name: The Mushroom Hunt!
quests.description: The Lady Gourmet: My doggie just looooves Special Mushrooms! I'd like you to bring me 20 of them, as I can't resist his puppy eyes. However, beware of that filthy pink vagrant brute!

quests.name: Panning for Goldenfish
quests.description: The Collector: I'd do anything to get my hands on some legendary Goldenfish! I'm begging you to bring me 2 of them! Wait! Make that 3! Please catch these fish and bring them here!

quests.name: Hunt the Gendrome!
quests.description: Ambitious Noble: My caravans are being hit by packs of Genprey. It appears there is an extraordinarily powerful boss among them! Hunt down the monster and make the roads safe again for all!

quests.name: The Land Shark
quests.description: Oasis Village Chief: Our pack-animals were eaten by something in the desert. But nobody actually saw the monster attack! Track down this vile beast and take it out!

quests.name: The Lurking Desert Giant
quests.description: Lynian Clan Leader: When some of my clan went gathering in the desert, they were attacked by an enormous crab, nya! As long as he's around, we can't do business. Help us, nya!

quests.name: Slay the Genprey!
quests.description: Injured Soldier: I'm too injured to go on... The Genprey living in the desert have the power to paralyze their foes. I'd like you to find the pack that did this to me and kill 20 of the fiends!

quests.name: Liver of Legend!
quests.description: Foreign Peddler: Hello sirs and madams! I deal in rare items that I find in the desert. Recently I've got a buyer for Piscine Wyvern and Sand Wyvern livers. Deliver 3 of them to me!

quests.name: Gone Fishin'
quests.description: Twilight Fisherman: Fishing. It carries on in the hearts of children and remains a simple pleasure for adults. Hearken back to a simpler time and bring me back 2 of the desert's most precious gift... Goldenfish!

quests.name: Attack of the Yian Kut-Ku
quests.description: Novice Hunter: That big eared Yian Kut-Ku really made mincemeat out of me! It's out of my league, so I want you to hunt it down for me! He's all yours!

quests.name: Charge... Charge... Charge!
quests.description: The Shocked Lord: We have a plan to rid the swamp of the scourge of the Bulldrome; however, we do not have enough hunters for the job. That is why we need your help! Let us rid the swamp of this foul beast!

quests.name: The Mischief Maker
quests.description: Oblivious Daughter: I took a trip to the swamp and saw a pretty pink animal with fangs. But when I tried to call it to the carriage, it threw something dirty at me and now I can't get the smell off! Punish it!

quests.name: The Ruler of the Snow
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: My next request requires a true master... Care to test yourself? I'd like you to hunt down the chief of the snowy mountains. Remember, on the quest negligence is unforgivable.

quests.name: Gathering - Swamp Zone
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the Swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Gathering - Forest and Hills
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the forest and hills. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Gathering - Volcanic Zone
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the Volcanic Belt. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: The Ruler of the Snow
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: My next request requires a true master... Care to test yourself? I'd like you to hunt down the chief of the snowy mountains. Remember, on the quest negligence is unforgivable.

quests.name: The Shadow in the Cave
quests.description: Old Geologist: We were exploring a cave near here, but stumbled on this disgusting blob-like monster! If you can't get rid of that thing, our research is doomed! Help us!

quests.name: Blango Slaying Tactics
quests.description: Armory Owner: The pelt of a Blango can be made into various pieces of armor that are useful in everyday life. Slay 10 of the beasts and bring me their pelts. Beware of the Giadrome.

quests.name: The Subterranean Glutton
quests.description: Delicacy Collector: I'm after the rare larvae of the Khezu. They should be on the summit, so search there. These whelps aren't to be taken lightly. If you run out of Pickaxes, combine a bone with a rock!

quests.name: Master of the Giant Lake
quests.description: Master Shipwright: Hunt down the water wyvern that keeps harassing my shipyard! Your target is a monster covered in green scales that is mor powerful than its cousin! Heh heh!

quests.name: The Pink Fur Party
quests.description: Curly Haired Girl: A huge group of Congas, along with one of their big pink bosses are gathering together. Please get rid of 20 of them... I think it will drive the rest away! Help me, pretty please!

quests.name: The Hidden Jungle Clouds
quests.description: Pale Boy: I thought dark clouds had covered the moon, but it was actually a swarm of Hornetaurs! The jungle is covered with the bugs and I need you to exterminate 50 of the Hornetaur pests!

quests.name: The Underwater Terror
quests.description: The Old Misanthrope: That lake underneath the desert is connected to an underground river and patrolled by a green-scaled water wyvern... If you are truly a hunter, then it should pose no problem.

quests.name: Evening Hermitaur Sonata
quests.description: Merchant Envoy: Those pesky Hermitaurs are starting to get in the way of my business. They hide in the sand and ambush you in a moment's notice. I also spotted a Daimyo Hermitaur, so be extremely careful!

quests.name: The Purple Poison Menace
quests.description: Guarded Merchant: I saw a gigantic bird-like monster deep in the jungle! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

quests.name: Pincer through the Sky
quests.description: Furious Merchant: A Shogun Ceanataur is running rampant over the swamp zone! Whether it be human or animal, it is attacking everything in sight. Head to the swamp and end its reign of terror!

quests.name: Chase the Poison Gypceros!
quests.description: The Gem Hunter: The Gypceros is known to have a fondness for shiny objects. It is also known to occasionally steal ore from humans. Slaying a Gypceros may net you some great treasures.

quests.name: Trouble in the Forest
quests.description: Lumberjack: I'm a lumberjack and I'm not OK. Those boar-monsters, the Bullfangos, have been a lot of trouble lately. Can you thin the herd by 20, Much obliged.

quests.name: Seeking the Strange Mask
quests.description: Princess's Attendant: This is awful! The princess saw some strange masked monsters that made her run for the hills! We're sending troops on a hunt for the fiends, so track down the masked marauders!

quests.name: The Ioprey Leader
quests.description: Hardened Mercenary: We were just in a fight with a pack of Ioprey, but were routed and had to retreat before we could defeat their leader. Hunt it down for us, but beware of its poison attacks.

quests.name: Basarios: Unseen Peril
quests.description: Survivor: A wyvern attacked my team from out of the blue while we were on an expedition to the Volcanic Belt. Where did it come from? Please slay it!

quests.name: A Band of Ceanataurs
quests.description: Digging Fanatic: I wanted to keep digging in search of the ultimate treasure trove... But some Ceantaurs smashed my Pickaxe! If you don't get rid of them, there will be no digging for me! Help me!

quests.name: Great Ore Discovery
quests.description: Famed Ore Merchant: In a corner of the volcanic belt, I discovered a great vein of coal in the rocks. I'd like you to mine the coal, but beware of the Shogun Ceanataur! Take care and get mining!

quests.name: A Giant Dragon Invades!
quests.objective: Defend the Fortress from the Lao-Shan Lung
quests.unlock: Clear all 3★ and 4★ Hunting Quests above this one.
quests.description: Loyal Minister: A giant dragon has attacked our fort! If the fort falls, so too do our lands! Use its installed weaponry to make this beast pay for its indicretions!
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: The Meeting of Daimyo
quests.description: Tanned Fisherman: Help! There has been an explosion of so many Daimyo Hermitaurs near our fishing grounds that we can't handle things by ourselves! Get rid of as many as you can so we can get back to fishing!
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Daimyo Hermitaurs must be slain before the time is up.

quests.name: Go Fish Goldenfish!
quests.description: Foreign Peddler: I've come from across the sands to sell all manners of strange and unusual wares, but I have a request. Please deliver to me 8 Goldenfish from the desert. I promise to reward you well!

quests.name: Absolute Power
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: The Tigrex, said to be an ancestor of today's wyverns, has finally made an appearance. With such a powerful beast on the loose, the village is not safe. Hunt it down at once!

quests.name: Absolute Power
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: The Tigrex, said to be an ancestor of today's wyverns, has finally made an appearance. With such a powerful beast on the loose, the village is not safe. Hunt it down at once!

quests.name: The Tigrex's Roar
quests.description: Guild Messenger: I have an urgent request from a hunter on an expedition in the desert! It seems he has encountered the mighty Tigrex! Go to his aid and crush this beast at once!

quests.name: The Runaway Diablos
quests.description: Border Captain: A giant wyvern smashed the border-wall and ran into this area. We need to find and kill it before it causes any more trouble!

quests.name: The Fierce Black Horn
quests.description: Failed Millionaire: I had hired the most skilled hunters imaginable, and went on a safari for the famed Diablos... But what we found was no mere Diablos! We must slay that black horned wyvern! No matter what!

quests.name: Valor in the Swamp Zone
quests.description: Swamp Townsman: Even in the relative calm of the swamp zone, something has stirred up the monsters. In particular, heavily armored wyverns have been attacking us. Can you help us out?

quests.name: Terror of the Gravios
quests.description: Troubled Noble: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

quests.name: The King's Domain
quests.description: Brave Boys: Did you hear it? That voice that shook the ground? It even scared the fearless mercenaries! It must have been the king of the skies! But if you're a real hunter, it won't be a problem!

quests.name: Attack of the Rathalos
quests.description: Proud Soldier: It cannot be... We tried so hard to kill it... But... My entire war band was wiped out by a wyvern.Now it all rests upon your shoulders, monster hunter! Slay it!

quests.name: The Queen's Descent
quests.description: Nomadic Botanist: A Rathian is making its nest in the jungle. This protective mother has made even stepping into the jungle a death sentence. Please clear the jungle of her threat.

quests.name: The Legendary Kirin
quests.description: Mountain Explorer: That must have been the phantom beast... The faint glow, and how it seemed to glide over land... There's no doubt that amazing riches await its slayer!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: The Red and Green Wyverns
quests.description: Braided Maiden: I must gather Herbs from the hillside if I am to cure my mother's illness. However, a fire breathing wyvern has settled into the area... If I do nothing, mama will only get worse. Please! Help me!

quests.name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quests.description: Injured Hero: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: Towards the Silence
quests.description: Grim Aristocrat: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but procedd with caution!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: Two Little Shadows
quests.description: Old Geologist: I was exploring the caverns with my assistants when two small, white shadows popped out of nowhere. Please do something about them as they are hindering my research! ...Actually, what are they??

quests.name: A Horde of Congalalas
quests.description: Swamp Townsman: Large Congalalas continue to gather, and at this rate, they'll completely trash the Swamp and affect our town's way of life. I'm not asking that you get rid of them all, but even 2 would help!
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Congalalas must be slain before the time is up.

quests.name: The Approaching Gaoren
quests.objective: Slay or repel the Shen Gaoren
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: Bullfangos in the Night
quests.description: Very Suspect Peddler: A Bulldrome and its pack are going hog-wild around a mining point for Ore. I don't want others to find that secret location, so please hunt them in secret for me.

quests.name: Whack a Shakalaka
quests.description: Deserted Arena Manager: I went to open up the little arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that it's been taken over by a group of strange, little... things! Now I need your help to take them out!

quests.name: Carnivore Carnival
quests.description: Deserted Arena Manager: I went to open up the little arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that it's been turned into a meat-lover's paradise! Please put an end to their partying!

quests.name: The Beating of Royal Wings
quests.notes: You must slay 25 Vespoids before the queen appears.

quests.name: Secret Request: Hypnocatrice
quests.description: Selfish Mantled Girl: I told my mother that I wanted a hat adorned with a Hypnotrice's tail feather, but she got mad and said I was being selfish. Therefore this is a secret request. You must tell no one, OK!?
quests.notes: Unlocks Nekoht's 7★ Quests . Boulder: Between Areas 4 and 5 Despite this being considered a High Rank quest, you start at the base camp with supplies.

quests.name: The Burning Dunes
quests.description: Old Desert Town Mayor: There is a gigantic Cephadrome here in the Old Desert. There are numerous casualties and a state of emergency has been declared. We're calling on all hunters everywhere to please help!

quests.name: Stealing in the Old Swamp!
quests.description: Compassionate Hunter: That Gypceros stole my very important Book of Combos and then, right after that, a band of Melynx stole my BBQ Spit! At this rate, I'm going to be forced into early retirement! Heeeeelp!

quests.name: The Purple Poison Menace
quests.description: Guarded Merchant: I saw a gigantic bird-like monster deep in the jungle! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

quests.name: Target: Basarios
quests.description: Illegal Middleman: Off the record, I want you to hunt the Basarios down. You can tell the Guild that you failed and then sell the materials you get wholesale. Hmm? Oh no, this is a real request from the Guild...

quests.name: Congalala's Assault
quests.description: Selfish Landowner: A large number of Congalalas are congregating in the Swamp and I want you to hunt them down. You must get rid of at least 2 of those horrid things for me. I won't accept any less!
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Congalalas must be hunted before the time is up.

quests.name: The Meeting of Daimyo
quests.description: Tanned Fisherman: Help! There has been an explosion of so many Daimyo Hermitaurs near our fishing grounds that we can't handle things by ourselves! Get rid of as many as you can so we can get back to fishing!
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Daimyo Hermitaurs must be slain before the time is up.

quests.name: Epic Hunt in the Jungle!
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Gutsy Youth: So I hear a Yian Kut-Ku and a Daimyo Hermitaur are in the Jungle. Sounds like a job for me! Don't worry, if you fail I'll mop them up for you. You can count on it!

quests.name: Secret Request: 2 Monoblos!
quests.objective: Hunt the Monoblos and White Monoblos
quests.description: Pretty Mantled Lady: An ancient wall painting our country was researching was destroyed by a Monoblos, and as an art-lover, I won't stand for it! My father can't spare any soldiers, so you're my only hope!

quests.name: The Remobra Den
quests.description: Deserted Arena Manager: I went to open up the big arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that it's been turned into a Remobra nest! Please, I need you to help me clear them out!

quests.name: The Sleepy Great Forest
quests.description: Short Hair Mantled Girl: I got a request to hunt some Hypnocatrices, but I have so many other things to do that I can't handle it all. Can you handle it in my stead, please? ...But please keep this a secret, OK?

quests.name: Green Waves of Verdure
quests.description: Hasty High Official: Help! I've received word that a Green Plesioth has appeared along our Queen's route to another land. Please take care of it in secret for us before she enters the area!

quests.name: Elegy for a Lone Wolf
quests.description: Mantled Lone Hunter: Phew... I barely made it out alive from that Yian Garuga. I'll tell you what. You keep it a secret and I'll let you know where you can find this sly, cool-headed beast. Have we got a deal?

quests.name: Battle with the Monoblos
quests.description: Kokoto Village Chief: This is a request to the virtuous hunters of Pokke. A Monoblos is tearing through the desert near my village of Kokoto. Please hunt it down for us!

quests.name: Secret Request: 2 Monoblos!
quests.objective: Hunt the Monoblos and White Monoblos
quests.description: Pretty Mantled Lady: An ancient wall painting our country was researching was destroyed by a Monoblos, and as an art-lover, I won't stand for it! My father can't spare any soldiers, so you're my only hope!

quests.name: Kut-Ku Calamity!
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Riled Villager: Aaaah!! A Kut-Ku here and a Kut-Ku there! The hillside is covered in a confusion of red and blue! We don't care if you have to get rid of them one at a time, but please, just do it!
quests.notes: A minimum of 1 Yian Kut-Ku and 1 Blue Yian Kut-Ku must be hunted before the time is up.

quests.name: Basarios Season
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Basarios must be hunted before the time is up.

quests.name: A Shogun Tastes Like...?
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Mantled Lady: I've had the pleasure of tasting some exotic foods in my social circles, and I'm afraid I've grown fond of Shogun meat. They're experiencing a population boom, so what better timing?
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Shogun Ceanataurs must be hunted before the time is up.

quests.name: Bl-Bl-Blangongas!
quests.objective: Survive until Time Over or Deliver Paw Pass Ticket
quests.description: Mantled Lady in Green: My request is this: Please hunt down a few Blangongas in a row. The beasts are too hard for the hunter of my village, so please keep this a secret and spare their pride. Good luck!
quests.notes: A minimum of 2 Blangongas must be hunted before the time is up.

quests.name: Operation Desert Winds
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Guild Messenger: We've received word that an airship made an emergency landing in the Desert, but a Monoblos often walks thorugh the area, and the desert is also home to a Plesioth. Please hurry to the hunt!

quests.name: Congalala in a Crab Shell
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Oblivious Daughter: I spotted that Congalala I ran into last time fighting ferociously with Mr. Crab in the Swamp. I don't want anyone else to suffer as I have, so please do something about them both!

quests.name: Sleepy Miasma, Poison Mist
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Jungle Town Diplomat: The Jungle is naturally foggy, but this time there was something unusual in the air. As it turned out, it's the fault of two monsters in particular. I wonder if you could hunt them down for us?

quests.name: Carnivores in the Old Jungle
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Attack of the Wind Dragon
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★ and 8★ single monster quests

quests.name: Indigo Meteor
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★ and 8★ single monster quests
quests.description: Fallen Aristocrat: A perfectly clear desert night sky opened up and she descended upon me... Her form was that of a breathtaking shooting star. Surely, I am to be her king. Come, she mustn't escape me!

quests.name: The Empress's Blazing Throne
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★ and 8★ single monster quests

quests.name: Lao-Shan Lung Draws Near!
quests.objective: Defend the Fortress from Ash Lao-Shan Lung
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★ and 8★ single monster quests
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: Secret Request: Nargacuga
quests.description: Brave Mantled Youth: I couldn't sit by while the Nargacuga hurt our people, so I snuck out to go slay it... and failed. I can't face my father like this, so please defeat it for me in secret!
quests.notes: Unlocks the 8★ "Wyvern of the Wind" & "Born of Darkness" quests for the Gathering Hall. You start this quest at the base camp.

quests.name: Secret Request: Nargacuga!
quests.description: Brave Mantled Youth: I couldn't sit by while the Nargacuga hurt our people, so I snuck out to go slay it... and failed. I can't face my father like this, so please defeat it for me in secret!
quests.notes: Unlocks the 8★ "Wyvern of the Wind" & "Born of Darkness" quests for the Gathering Hall. You start this quest at the base camp.

quests.name: Assassin of the Jungle
quests.description: Bearded Soldier: Our head drill sergeant was attacked while out on an expedition in the Old Jungle by an unknown assailant. We think it's probably a monster, but we require the assistance of a hunter!

quests.name: Dancing Desert Queen
quests.description: Healed Hunter: Wow, nothing like a hunting ground to get the blood pumping and the spirit ready for the hunt! Unfortunately, while I've been gone, the requests have been piling up. Can you lend me a hand?

quests.name: Descendants of the King
quests.objective: Hunt the Azure Rathalos and Pink Rathian

quests.name: Diablos, the Demon King
quests.description: Wounded Hunter: Ah, I tried to slay it, but I was in way over my head. Still, I can't let it go, so I ask that if you have the courage to face this beast, to please step forward.

quests.name: The Four Spires
quests.description: Bandage-Wrapped Man: I saw four black towers rising up on the dunes... I know what I saw! It was no dream, but reality! Please, save the Old Desert Town and my two dear daughters from those menaces!

quests.name: Two Black Suits of Armor
quests.description: Guild Retiree: All of the hunters who have taken on this request have falled one by one, until there was no one left who would even consider it. 'Tis lamentable, no? Is there no one who has the guts to try?

quests.name: Explore the Unexplored
quests.unlock: Hunt a combined total of 100 Bird, Flying, or Piscine Wyverns. Excluding the four Dromes.

quests.name: A Single Beam of Moonlight
quests.unlock: Hunt a combined total of 100 Bird, Flying, or Piscine Wyverns. Excluding the four Dromes.

quests.name: Fire Ring, Lunar Ring
quests.objective: Hunt the Silver Rathalos and Gold Rathian
quests.unlock: Clear "Explore the Unexplored" and "A Single Beam of Moonlight"
quests.description: Big-Nosed Mantled Man: A gold- and silver-colored wyvern have taken over the area our village was going to develop. We'd like to keep this area a secret, even from hunters we know, so we're counting on you!

quests.name: Attack of the Rajang
quests.description: Big-Voiced Mantled Man: Wahaha! It is I, the Mystery Man! I came here to drive the Instructor's Rajang crazy and to hinder the progress of his students! So, come on, take my job! It can be our secret. Wahaha!

quests.name: Diamond Dust
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters

quests.name: Hard-Shelled Terrors
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Princess's Attendant: The princess has run off by herself to dig up some jewels in the Volcano! If someone were to find out, it would cause a huge stink. We haven't a moment to lose. Please set out at once!

quests.name: Bird Wyvern All-Stars
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Bitterly Unlucky Journey Lady: I absolutely hate birds. I hate their voices, their beaks, their eyes -- everything! And just my luck, 3 bird-like monsters live right next to my house. ARGH! Please help me!

quests.name: Sand Dune's Might
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.description: Half-Wild Mercenary: The scorching sands reveal a Monoblos while a Daimyo surfaces from underground and the roar of a Rathian echoes overhead. This isn't a request, but a warning. If you head out, return safely!

quests.name: Evaporate into the Night
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★, 8★ and 9★ single monster quests

quests.name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★, 8★ and 9★ single monster quests
quests.description: Injured Hero: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: A Midnight Audience
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★, 8★ and 9★ single monster quests

quests.name: Fight for Your Life
quests.unlock: Clear all 7★, 8★ and 9★ single monster quests

quests.name: The Approaching Gaoren
quests.objective: Defend the Fortress from Shen Gaoren
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: Monster Hunter
quests.objective: Hunt all of the Large Monsters
quests.unlock: Clear all Elder and Nekoht Quests

quests.name: Mountain Herb Picking
quests.description: Loving Sibling: I want to pick some of this village's famous Mountain Herbs for my brother in town, but there are too many monsters! Could you please go out for me and bring back 5 Mountain Herbs?

quests.name: An Anteka in the Snow
quests.description: The Aged Apothecary: In the Eastern lands, it is said that an Anteka's antlers are good for one's health. I would like to test this proverb. Please acquire 3 of these antlers for this purpose.

quests.name: Hunt the Carnivore!
quests.description: Pokke Village Guard: HELP! The children are being attacked by small, white monsters called Giaprey! 5 of the beasts are outside! Do something! Please! Think of the children!

quests.name: Sinking Feeling
quests.description: Frightened Youth: As usual, I went into tthe mountains on my hunt for Popos; however, today they were frightened and fled to the summit. Something must be up there... Please get the Popo Tongues for me!

quests.name: Slay the Blangos!
quests.description: Wild Grass Gatherer: Whew! That was incredibly scary! On my walk uo the mountain road, some Blangos began to chase me! I think they are still up there, so please slay them quickly!

quests.name: The Carnivorous Leader
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: It seems that I can trust you with a difficult job like this. I'd like you to hunt down the leader of a Giaprey pack, the Giadrome. I wish you a beautiful victory in our defense!

quests.name: Gathering - Snowy Mountains
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the snowy mountains. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Gathering - Jungle Zone
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the jungle. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Gathering - Desert Zone
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the desert. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: The Carnivorous Leader
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: It seems that I can trust you with a difficult job like this. I'd like you to hunt down the leader of a Giaprey pack, the Giadrome. I wish you a beautiful victory in our defense!

quests.name: Reckless Bulldrome Hunter
quests.description: Troubled Father: My son decided to become a hunter and ran off after a Bulldrome on his own! Of course, now the tables have turned and I'm worried! Hunt down the Bulldrome on the snowy mountains!

quests.name: Slay the Giaprey!
quests.description: Proud Farmer: I chased off a Giaprey that was feeding on my Popos, but now it's back with 19 of its buddies! I can't take on the whole lot of them! Hunters, this is your chance! Please get rid of them for me!

quests.name: The Pack of Blangos
quests.description: Calm Villager: I request that you slay the Blangos rampaging through the mountains... A Bulldrome was also spotted in the area. Successfully avoid the Bulldrome and go about your mission.

quests.name: The Taboo of Negligence!
quests.description: Optimistic Lady: The Mountain Herb, one of the seven sacred mountain flowers. truly captures the spirit of the mountains. There shouldn't be any wyverns in this weather, so you may gather with ease.

quests.name: Hunt Down the Velocidrome!
quests.description: Newly Wedded Husband: It seems that whenever my wife goes to pick mushrooms in the Jungle, a large carnivore appears! There's no way I can let her go pick mushrooms now... Please! Make the Jungle safe again!

quests.name: Jungle Menace
quests.description: Jungle Envoy: I want you to hunt and kill the giant bird-like monster that has appeared in our jungle. It's wreaking havoc on our environment and must be stopped!

quests.name: Rarest of the Rare Beasts
quests.description: Village Grocer: Do you know of a pink, fanged beast that roams the jungle? That beast has dirtied my shop beyond hope! It's impossible to clean up! Get rid of it before I'm soiled again!

quests.name: Hunt the Rare Forest Congas!
quests.description: Oblivious Daughter: I took a trip to the jungle and saw some beautiful pink animals with fangs. But when I tried to pet them from my carriage, the beasts made a stink on me! I can't get it off! Punish those meanies!

quests.name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
quests.description: Jungle Envoy: My village is under attack by a swarm of bug monsters! It seems there are about 20 of them. One on one they are not a threat, but as a group they are deadly. So be careful.

quests.name: Collect to Combine
quests.description: Combining Madam: An affinity towards combining is important, but so are fresh raw materials! Special Mushrooms from the jungle are sure to improve your hunting life and wallet! Gather 10 of them!

quests.name: Hunt the Gendrome!
quests.description: Ambitious Noble: My caravans are being hit by packs of Genprey. It appears there is an extraordinarily powerful boss among them! Hunt down the monster and make the roads safe again for all!

quests.name: The Land Shark
quests.description: Oasis Village Chief: Our pack-animals were eaten by something in the desert. But nobody actually saw the monster attack! Track down this vile beast and take it out!

quests.name: Liver of Legend!
quests.description: Foreign Peddler: Hello sirs and madams! I deal in rare items that I find in the desert. Recently I've got a buyer for Piscine Wyvern and Sand Wyvern livers. Deliver 3 of them to me!

quests.name: Gone Fishin'
quests.description: Twilight Fisherman: Fishing. It carries on in the hearts of children and remains a simple pleasure for adults. Hearken back to a simpler time and bring me back 2 of the desert's most precious gift... Goldenfish!

quests.name: Shadow in the Snow
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: If it's not one thing, it's another, right? Near the village, a strange flying wyvern called a Khezu has been spotted. It is strong, but I believe you can handle ist. Do your very best!

quests.name: Gathering - Swamp Zone
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the Swamp. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: Shadow in the Snow
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: If it's not one thing, it's another, right? Near the village, a strange flying wyvern called a Khezu has been spotted. It is strong, but I believe you can handle ist. Do your very best!

quests.name: The Subterranean Glutton
quests.description: Delicacy Collector: I'm after the rare larvae of the Khezu. They should be on the summit, so search there. These whelps aren't to be taken lightly. If you run out of Pickaxes, combine a bone with a rock!

quests.name: Blango Slaying Tactics
quests.description: Armory Owner: The pelt of a Blango can be made into various pieces of armor that are useful in everyday life. Slay 10 of the beasts and bring me their pelts. Beware of the Giadrome.

quests.name: Aim for the Jungle Crab
quests.description: Uncomfortable Butler: I've always longed to go hunting in the jungle! However, if a huge monster appeared, I'd be finished! Maybe you could take out the Daimyo Hermitaur for me?

quests.name: Master of the Giant Lake
quests.description: Master Shipwright: Hunt down the water wyvern that keeps harassing my shipyard! Your target is a monster covered in green scales that is mor powerful than its cousin! Heh heh!

quests.name: A Swarm of Hermitaurs
quests.description: Jungle Fisherman: Fishing is no easy endeavor, but lately things have gotten out of hand! While unloading my ship, a swarm of Hermitaur appeared. Slay 10 of them and let me get on with my work!

quests.name: The Purple Poison Menace
quests.description: Guarded Merchant: I saw a gigantic bird-like monster deep in the jungle! It scared everyone so bad that I can't do business with a thing like that out there! Please hunt it down so I can work in peace!

quests.name: The Lurking Desert Giant
quests.description: Lynian Clan Leader: When some of my clan went gathering in the desert, they were attacked by an enormous crab, nya! As long as he's around, we can't do business. Help us, nya!

quests.name: Water Wyvern in the Desert
quests.description: Proud Hunter: I found a giant water wyvern in a cave in the desert! I can't defeat it because it stays underwater. Slay it for me and the glory is all yours!

quests.name: Slay the Genprey!
quests.description: Injured Soldier: I'm too injured to go on... The Genprey living in the desert have the power to paralyze their foes. I'd like you to find the pack that did this to me and kill 20 of the fiends!

quests.name: Gypceros: Venomous Terror
quests.description: Swamp Farmer: The fields all around the town are getting torn to shreds by a gigantic poisonous bird-like monster. Exterminate it for us! Its poison can melt crops, so be careful it doesn't melt you!

quests.name: Attack of the Blue Kut-Ku
quests.description: Novice Hunter: That big eared Yian Kut-Ku really made mincemeat out of me! It's out of my league, so I want you to hunt it down for me! He's all yours!

quests.name: The Mischief-maker
quests.description: Oblivious Daughter: I took a trip to the swamp and saw a pretty pink animal with fangs. But when I tried to call it to the carriage, it threw something dirty at me and now I can't get the smell off! Punish it!

quests.name: Fang of the Iodrome!
quests.description: Swamp Village Envoy: My village is under attack by a pack of Ioprey. Inside their pack, they are led by an incredibly large boss with poison filled fangs. Slay this creature for us!

quests.name: Slay the Great Kut-Ku
quests.description: Foothills Guardsman: A bird-like Yian Kut-Ku is attacking people the world over! It has even shown up in these very hills! If it isn't eliminated soon, we're finished! Show me what you're made of!

quests.name: A Killing from Mushrooms
quests.description: Impatient Trader: Prices on mushrooms from the forest and hills have skyrocketed. Please gather 10 of them for me and I'll cut you in on the profits! But beware of the Kut-Ku rumored to roam the area.

quests.name: The Ruler of the Snow
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: My next request requires a true master... Care to test yourself? I'd like you to hunt down the chief of the snowy mountains. Remember, on the quest negligence is unforgivable.

quests.name: Gathering - Volcanic Zone
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A gathering quest in the Volcanic Belt. Gather all the materials you can from the field, then deliver the Paw Pass Ticket to finish up.

quests.name: The Ruler of the Snow
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: My next request requires a true master... Care to test yourself? I'd like you to hunt down the chief of the snowy mountains. Remember, on the quest negligence is unforgivable.

quests.name: Red Shadow in the Swampland
quests.description: Uncomfortable Butler: I've always longed to venture into the swamp! I think I could hunt down a Kelbi, but I could never fight a wyvern. Maybe you'd take care of this special monster for me...

quests.name: The Lone Black Garuga
quests.description: Barmaid: A Yian Garuga has been spotted in the jungle and there is now a vigorous search on for this atrocious beast. It has downed many a hunter, so take care as you hunt it!

quests.name: Twin Velocidrome
quests.description: Jungle Lord: 2 Velocidrome and their brood have long been menacing this area. Please destroy the two Velocidrome to dispense the pack and return peace and quiet to the jungle!

quests.name: Attack of the Giant Bugs!
quests.description: Jungle Envoy: My village is under attack by a swarm of bug monsters! It seems there are about 20 of them. One on one they are not a threat, but as a group they are deadly. So be careful.

quests.name: Battle of the Blos
quests.description: Kokoto Village Chief: This is a request to the vituous hunters of Pokke. A Monoblos is tearing through the desert near my village of Kokoto. Please hunt it down for us!
quests.notes: Speaking with the Village Chief Elder after finishing the quest grants the Hero of Kkto Bio .

quests.name: The Silver Horn
quests.description: Former Kokoto Hunter: I beseech you for help! An old enemy has cut our hunters down to the last man... I fled to tell you that the silver horned White Monoblos terrorizes us once again! Rid us of it!

quests.name: Supreme Ruler of the Swamp
quests.description: Scheming Strategist: Hunter! It is time tohunt down the Shogun Ceanataur. Let us rid the swamp zone of this menace and expand our strategic possibilities. This is a highly classified hunt. So don't tell a soul!

quests.name: Trapped by Yian Kut-Ku
quests.objective: Hunt the Yian Kut-Ku and Blue Yian Kut-Ku
quests.description: Beautiful Lady: The Yian Kut-Ku are circling, screaming in their shrill voices. Everyone is trapped inside the town! Please do something!

quests.name: The Ioprey Leader
quests.description: Hardened Mercenary: We were just in a fight with a pack of Ioprey, but were routed and had to retreat before we could defeat their leader. Hunt it down for us, but beware of its poison attacks.

quests.name: Basarios: Unseen Peril
quests.description: Survivor: A wyvern attacked my team from out of the blue while we were on an expedition to the Volcanic Belt. Where did it come from? Please slay it!

quests.name: Commander in the Flames
quests.description: Chief Weapon smith: Upon our trip into the cave at the volcano, an enormous Shogun Ceanataur dropped down from the ceiling right on top of us! Its ambush caused massive damage! Rid the world of that scourge!

quests.name: Ioprey Hunting
quests.description: Mine Owner: While mining for ore, we encountered a huge Ioprey nest deep inside our tunnel! We can't continue working unless you kill 20 of them for us!

quests.name: A Band of Ceanataurs
quests.description: Digging Fanatic: I wanted to keep digging in search of the ultimate treasure trove... But some Ceantaurs smashed my Pickaxe! If you don't get rid of them, there will be no digging for me! Help me!

quests.name: More Coal Please
quests.description: Fort Guard: We need Coal to power our ambush spear cannon. Go to the Volcanic Belt and mine the reserves there! If you're worried about Pickaxes, combine a long cylindrical bone and a rock.

quests.name: The Frozen Dictator
quests.description: Fleeing Villager: I saw it! I saw it! In the middle of a blinding snow storm, there it was; dark black wings were dancing in the sky... No mere human could stand up to it! Don't even think of hunting it!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: The Elder Dragon of Wind
quests.description: Jungle Psychic: There was surely a vortex inside of that downpour. The wind wrapped around and revealed Kushala Daora! I don't foresee anyone defeating it. Weaken it and then drive it away!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: Hermitaur Buffet
quests.description: DesertedArenaManager: I went to open up the little arena that hasn't been used in a while one morning, and I find that a band of Hermitaurs have turned it into their home! Now I need your help to turn them out!

quests.name: Absolute Power
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: The Tigrex, said to be an ancestor of today's wyverns, has finally made an appearance. With such a powerful beast on the loose, the village is not safe. Hunt it down at once!

quests.name: Absolute Power
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: The Tigrex, said to be an ancestor of today's wyverns, has finally made an appearance. With such a powerful beast on the loose, the village is not safe. Hunt it down at once!

quests.name: The Legendary Kirin
quests.description: Mountain Explorer: That must have been the phantom beast... The faint glow, and how it seemed to glide over land... There's no doubt that amazing riches await its slayer!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: Two Roars in the Snow
quests.description: Alpine Survivor: It happened in an instant... Two Blangongas destroyed all the trees around my house. Now all I want to do is hunt them down so I can get my revenge. Please help me!

quests.name: The Poison Siege
quests.objective: Hunt the Gypceros and Purple Gypceros
quests.description: Selfish Princess: Two poisonous fowl have appeared in the jungle. With them there, the jungle flowers will surely wilt and die! Go kill them... Now!

quests.name: The Tigrex's Roar
quests.description: Guild Messenger: I have an urgent request from a hunter on an expedition in the desert! It seems he has encountered the mighty Tigrex! Go to his aid and crush this beast at once!

quests.name: The Runaway Diablos
quests.description: Border Captain: A giant wyvern smashed the border-wall and ran into this area. We need to find and kill it before it causes any more trouble!

quests.name: The Fierce Black Horn
quests.description: Failed Millionaire: I had hired the most skilled hunters imaginable, and went on a safari for the famed Diablos... But what we found was no mere Diablos! We must slay that black horned wyvern! No matter what!

quests.name: Ultimate Crab Dinner
quests.description: The Lady Gourmet: I am a true connoisseur of crab cuisine, and as such a connoisseur, I suspect the Daimyo Hermitaurs found in the desert are incredibly tasty! One is never enough, so hunt down two!

quests.name: Black Rock in the Swamp
quests.description: Swamp Townsman: Even in the relative calm of the swamp zone, something has stirred up the monsters. In particular, heavily armored wyverns have been attacking us. Can you help us out?

quests.name: Seeking the Strange Mask
quests.description: Princess's Attendant: This is awful! The princess saw some strange masked monsters that made her run for the hills! We're sending troops on a hunt for the fiends, so track down the masked marauders!

quests.name: Terror of the Gravios
quests.description: Troubled Noble: A fearsome Gravios has appeared amidst the magma and desolation of the Volcanic Belt. Hunt down the fire breather for us!

quests.name: Check the Ancient Tower
quests.description: Wyverian Maiden: A relic of olden days, the ancient tower is now off-limits. Those examining it should beware the danger posed by the Remobras. They must be defeated before entering the tower!

quests.name: The Empress' Blazing Throne
quests.description: Elder Dragon Scholar: We've received a communique from headquarters. An elder dragon has appeared in the Volcanic Belt. Fight the dragon and collect data on its behavior!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: Overseer of the Ancients
quests.description: Scarlet Mystery Man: Near the forbidden ancient tower, the Lunastra, empress of the elder dragon, is building a nest. Hunters! Who among you can defeat this ancient beast!? Exhibit your true skills!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: The Elder Dragon of Mist
quests.description: Injured Hero: Our intuition told us to turn around, but we thought no one was there... Yet even though no one should've been there, we were attacked from behind! Beware! It was an enemy never before seen!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: Towards the Silence
quests.description: Grim Aristocrat: It seems an unknown elder dragon has appeared in the swamp zone. However, no one truly got a clear look at it. What could the beast have been? Slay it, but procedd with caution!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: Small Shadow over the Swamp
quests.description: Novice Hunter: I was gathering mushrooms in the Swamp when a Khezu appeared, but it was no ordinary Khezu. What was so different about it? You'll know as soon as you see it!
quests.notes: Target is mini gold crown sized

quests.name: Congalala Territorial Fight
quests.description: Swamp Envoy: Two Congalalas have started a territorial fight over the Swamp. If they're not stopped soon, it'll ruin commerce in the area! Please hurry and put an end to their dispute.

quests.name: A Troublesome Pair
quests.description: Pokke Village Chief: A pair of fire wyverns have taken up residence in the hillside. If you are able to hunt them by yourself, you are truly a top class hunter. Care to try your luck?

quests.name: Dual Plesioth
quests.objective: Hunt the Plesioth and Green Plesioth
quests.description: Lovely Princess: The water wyvern known as Plesioth is raging in the jungle. And not just one of them! Head off immediately to slay them!

quests.name: Pink Dance in the Jungle
quests.description: Uncomfortable Butler: I've always longed to be a hunter, but a meeting with a Rathian ended that! Now that I know what it takes, I'll start over, but you have the spirit to hunt down that Rathian!

quests.name: Four Horns
quests.objective: Hunt the Diablos and Black Diablos
quests.description: Lovely Princess: I simply can't bear to think about the terror and pain those Diablos are causing my people. I can't sleep at night with that worry! Hunt down those 2 Diablos for me!

quests.name: Emperor of Flame
quests.description: Heroic General: I have an earnest request of you... I want you to fight the elder fire dragon we cornered in the Volcanic Belt! Weaken it with your repeated counterattacks and then finally slay the beast!
quests.notes: Appears randomly after being cleared once.

quests.name: A Sun with Fangs
quests.description: Wyverian Pioneer: While in the secluded desert village, I spotted an elder dragon with red scales! While I do know some hunters, it would be wrong to make this request of them... So it's up to you!
quests.notes: Appears randomly.

quests.name: The Shogun's Encampment
quests.description: Hunter In Training: Hey! Hey! Have you heard the news!? There's a rumor that two enormous monsters with thick shells have appeared in the Volcanic Belt! There must be a hunter somewhere who can face them!

quests.name: Attack of the Rathalos
quests.description: Proud Soldier: It cannot be... We tried so hard to kill it... But... My entire war band was wiped out by a wyvern.Now it all rests upon your shoulders, monster hunter! Slay it!

quests.name: A State of Crisis!
quests.description: Red-Faced Commander: Gather, bold hunters! You are the lynchpin of our national defense! A menace creeps towards this town. You must repel this monster and defend the fort.
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Town is destroyed.

quests.name: The Final Invitation
quests.description: Scarlet Mystery Man: There are two Rajang, each with golden fur. Hunters, I have prepared a special stage for your grandest performance. Demonstrate your true power... He he he...
quests.notes: The first Rajang is of the smallest possible size, while the second is of the largest. Both start the quest enraged.

quests.name: A Giant Dragon Invades!
quests.description: Loyal Minister: A giant dragon has attacked our fort! If the fort falls, so too do our lands! Use its installed weaponry to make this beast pay for its indicretions!
quests.notes: Additional Fail Condition: The Fortress is destroyed.

quests.name: Secret Request: Hypnocatrice
quests.description: Selfish Mantled Girl: I told my mother that I wanted a hat adorned with a Hypnotrice's tail feather, but she got mad and said I was being selfish. Therefore this is a secret request. You must tell no one, OK!?
quests.notes: Unlocks Nekoht's 7★ Quests . Boulder: Between Areas 4 and 5 Despite this being considered a High Rank quest, you start at the base camp with supplies.

quests.name: Basic Training - Basics
quests.description: Instructor: I am your esteemed instructor. First, I shall have you deliver some Raw Meat. Slay a Popo in the wild, and deliver the meat to the Delivery Box in camp. Good luck.

quests.name: Basic Training - BBQ
quests.description: Instructor: Your esteemed instructor. Now we will cover BBQ training. Carve Raw Meat from a Popo and then use the BBQ Spit to cook a tasty steak. It's my dinner, so don't burn it!

quests.name: Basic Training - Combining
quests.description: Instructor: Take some advice from your esteemed instructor, if there is one thing a hunter cannot go without, it is a Potion. Drink it when injured and all will be well. Never forget this!

quests.name: Basic Training - Fishing
quests.description: Instructor: Once again you come before your esteemed instructor. Your next quest is to deliver a Sushifish. Use bait near the waterside and catch a big one. Just deliver it before dinner!

quests.name: Basic Training - Gathering
quests.description: Instructor: Another lesson from your esteemed instructor. Today you will train in gathering Honey. Snowy mountain's honey is less sweet but more fragrant than regular honey. A real treat with manly men!

quests.name: Basic Training - Hunting
quests.description: Instructor: You will hold me in great esteem as I say this is the last basic training quest. You must hunt down the fierce Giadrome. Stare death in the face and show your true hunting spirit.

quests.name: Basic Training - Transport
quests.description: Instructor: I am truly esteemed, especially as an instructor. Today's quest is to snatch a Carnivore Egg and return it to camp. This may be training, but it is no opportunity to slack!

quests.name: Sword Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Sword mastery is the jumping attack. Gauge the distance of the jump and then unleash a string of deadly attacks!

quests.name: Long Sword Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Long Sword mastery lies in the Spirit gauge. If you can fill the gauge, your attack power will increase greatly! Fill it up!

quests.name: Great Sword Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Great Sword mastery is using ready attacks and charge slices. View your enemy and decide if a quick cut or strong slice is best.

quests.name: Dual Blade Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Dual Blade mastery is the timing of Demonization. Don't wait for a chance to Demonize, Demonize and create your own chances.

quests.name: Hammer Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Hammer mastery is the charge attack. An attack should be charged to the right level then released. Time the hit with your soul!

quests.name: Hunting Horn Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: I, your instructor, I must inform you that the key to Hunting Horn mastery is in the Recital. String together 2 white notes to make yourself strong, then claim victory before the effect wears off.

quests.name: Lance Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Lance mastery is guarding. Use the Lance to block an approaching monster's attack then counter fiercely!

quests.name: Gunlance Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: As your esteemed instructor, I must inform you that the key to Gunlance mastery is bombardment. Blast armored monsters into submission, then take that chance to unleash Wyvern's Fire!

quests.name: Bow Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: Your esteemed instructor reminds you that the key to Bow is charging. Charge the power of the Bow and then release it at the perfect moment. Charged arrows are a unique beast!

quests.name: Light Bowgun Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: Esteemed instructor here, remember the key to the Light Bowgun is ammo selection. Select your ammo depending on the monster and situation. Master the qualities of each shot!

quests.name: Heavy Bowgun Mastery
quests.description: Instructor: Your esteemed instructor, reminds you that the key to Heavy Bowgun is judging the proper distance. A Bowgun's advantages aren't limited to long distances, so pick the right distance!

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Yian-Kut-Ku. Its weakness is its sensitivity to loud noises. Try a Sonic Bomb or even a Barrel-Bomb! Quicktip - The key to using a Sword is speed. Use your speed to get into the absolute best position possible! Current Point Multiplier: 95%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Yian-Kut-Ku. Its weakness is its sensitivity to loud noises. Try a Sonic Bomb or even a Barrel-Bomb! Quicktip - Time to learn the Great Sword. Evade more than you Guard and attack until the chance comes for a charged blow! Current Point Multiplier: 95%

armor.skills: Fire Res +4 Fate +3 Alchemy +2 Water Res -2

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Yian-Kut-Ku. Its weakness is its sensitivity to loud noises. Try a Sonic Bomb or even a Barrel-Bomb! Quicktip - It's Hammer time! Here is my new rap. "That monster ain't a star! I hit it on the head and it's seein' stars!" Current Point Multiplier: 100%

armor.skills: Defense +5 Throw +2 Guard +1 ThunderRes -2 All Resist -1

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Yian-Kut-Ku. Its weakness is its sensitivity to loud noises. Try a Sonic Bomb or even a Barrel-Bomb! Quicktip - As Lance users say, Guarding is life. Don't forget that! Guard against attacks, create an opening, then counter! Current Point Multiplier: 105%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Yian-Kut-Ku. Its weakness is its sensitivity to loud noises. Try a Sonic Bomb or even a Barrel-Bomb! Quicktip - The Light Bowgun has a new feature and it's called "Rapid Fire"! Learn it, live it, love it! Current Point Multiplier: 90%

armor.skills: Attack +3 PsychicVis +2 NormalS Up +2 Reload +2 Hunger -1
