armor.skills: Attack +3 Health +3 Fire Res +2 Water Res -1 Defense -1

armor.name: Kut-Ku Leggings
armor.skills: Attack +4 Health +2 Fire Res +2 Water Res -1 Defense -1

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Congalala. If you are hit by something it has thrown, the smell will spoil your items and you won't be able to use them! Quicktip - Now it's time for the Dual Blades! But beware of smelly attacks! If you get hosed, make sure to use Deodorant! Current Point Multiplier: 90%

armor.name: Kut Ku Greaves D
armor.skills: Attack +5 Expert +2 ElementAtk +1 Rec Speed -1 Defense -1 Health -1

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Congalala. If you are hit by something it has thrown, the smell will spoil your items and you won't be able to use them! Quicktip - Nimbly return the beast's attacks, make an opening, and then unleash the Spirit Blade! That's the way of the Long Sword. Current Point Multiplier: 95%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Congalala. If you are hit by something it has thrown, the smell will spoil your items and you won't be able to use them! Quicktip - You're still a bit of a rookie, so let me tell you a great combo. White-White-Red-Yellow, then you strike! Current Point Multiplier: 100%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Congalala. If you are hit by something it has thrown, the smell will spoil your items and you won't be able to use them! Quicktip - Say hello to a Lance with real firepower, the Gunlance! From thrusts to Shelling, combine attacks to victory! Current Point Multiplier: 105%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Congalala. If you are hit by something it has thrown, the smell will spoil your items and you won't be able to use them! Quicktip - Bow training has begun! You can use a chrge attack even with a coating! Keep your distance for maximum power! Current Point Multiplier: 100%

armor.name: Hi-Metal Guards
armor.skills: Health +3 Gunnery +3 Crag S Add +1 Stamina -2

armor.name: Hi-Metal Coat
armor.skills: Health +3 Gunnery +3 Crag S Add +1 Stamina -2

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Khezu. You must fear not only its electric attacks but also its roar. Thus, equip a weapon guard and be ready to use it. Quicktip - This time I've prepared a Sword that literally spits flames! It should lead to an easy victory, so show off your skills! Current Point Multiplier: 90%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Khezu. You must fear not only its electric attacks but also its roar. Thus, equip a weapon guard and be ready to use it. Quicktip - The weapon you have is tremendously powerful, but has terrible Sharpness. So charge it up and aim for the head! Current Point Multiplier: 120%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Khezu. You must fear not only its electric attacks but also its roar. Thus, equip a weapon guard and be ready to use it. Quicktip - Using a Hunting Horn means using Self-Improvement! If you can't, you're finished! Just link White-White. Current Point Multiplier: 110%

armor.skills: Expert +3 Attack +2 ElementAtk +1 Rec Speed -1 Health -2

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Khezu. You must fear not only its electric attacks but also its roar. Thus, equip a weapon guard and be ready to use it. Quicktip - When you see a Khezu's electricity wane, that's your chance! Use Wyvern's Fire and blow it away! Current Point Multiplier: 90%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Khezu. You must fear not only its electric attacks but also its roar. Thus, equip a weapon guard and be ready to use it. Quicktip - I've attached a Shield to your Heavy Bowgun. With this, you'll have a perfect Guard. You're allowed to be pleased. Current Point Multiplier: 95%

armor.name: Battle Guards
armor.skills: Reload +2 Attack +2 PsychicVis +2 NormalS Up +2 Hunger -1

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Daimyo Hermitaur. Supposedly you can only crack its shell with a Hammer or Hunting Horn, but a Lance works as well! Quicktip - You can't break a Daimyo's shell with this weapon! Thus aim for its claw. Attack it with a truly Devilish Dance! Current Point Multiplier: 100%

armor.name: Plesioth Mail
armor.skills: Stamina +2 Cold Res +2 Heat Res +2 Hunger -1 Paralysis -2

armor.name: Plesioth Greaves
armor.skills: Stamina +4 Cold Res +2 Heat Res +2 Hunger -1 Paralysis -2

loadouts.description: Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Daimyo Hermitaur. Supposedly you can only crack its shell with a Hammer or Hunting Horn, but a Lance works as well! Quicktip - The fast-moving Daimyo can only be stopped by breaking its legs! Strike as hard as you can and knock it down! Current Point Multiplier: 90%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Daimyo Hermitaur. Supposedly you can only crack its shell with a Hammer or Hunting Horn, but a Lance works as well! Quicktip - Break down the skull on the Daimyo's back with the shocking attacks of the Hunting Horn! Attack with gusto! Current Point Multiplier: 95%

Instructor: It is I, your esteemed instructor. Today you will battle a Daimyo Hermitaur. Supposedly you can only crack its shell with a Hammer or Hunting Horn, but a Lance works as well! Quicktip - Showdown time! With the high Guard ability of this equipment, you can never be defeated! Show your true power! Current Point Multiplier: 105%

armor.name: Giaprey Mail
